title: Infinite source of water
description: A mod that generates a water source in a single block, with different tiers/speeds.
body:
This mod adds blocks to generate and store water.

 

-Water can be taken by buckets or pipes.

-The water production can be interrupted by a redstone signal.

-If there is a redstone signal and the source is not full, water can also be added.

-Right-clicking on a source with an empty hand shows the current fill level.

 

-tier 1 can hold 2 buckets and produces 125 mb/5 ticks  
-tier 2 can hold 4 buckets and produces 250mb/4 ticks  
-tier 3 can hold 8 buckets and produces 500mb/3 ticks  
-tier 4 can hold 16 buckets and produces 1000mb/2 ticks  
-tier 5 can hold 32 buckets and produces 2000 mb/1 tick  
  
 

-To upgrade a water source you have to sneak and right click on the source with the corresponding item.  
-E.g.: Iron Upgrade + stone water source
